titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 249
GA 249
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: το deleted from 5.27 by Rachel Kevern.
το added to 5.27 by Rachel Kevern.

Changes to text at 4.21, 22, 44; 6.28, 44, 63; 7.41; 8.35, 44; 9.10, 15, 34; 10.22, 38, 40; 11.18, 30, 32, 41, 42, 45, 46, 54, 57; 12.21, 26; 13.8, 10, 20 by Rachel Kevern based on a reconciliation of our Final plain text transcription with a Final transcription by Michael Clark.

Various new lines and pages added or removed and some text moved between the beginning of chapter 9 and the end of the book by Rachel Kevern based on a reconciliation of our Final plain text transcription with a Final transcription by Michael Clark.

Various new lines and pages added or removed and some text moved up to the end of chapter 8 by Rachel Kevern based on a reconciliation of our Final plain text transcription with a Final transcription by Michael Clark.
Folio 135v and text of 1.51 removed by Rachel Kevern based on a reconciliation of our Final plain text transcription with a Final transcription by Michael Clark.
Iota adscript removed by David Parker.
Ghost page removed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 302490Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 136rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: E.P.Transcription begun: Jan 2 2011Transcription finished: Februar 2 2011 Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - No Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (>) - Yes: on all following folios transcribed apart from 181v, 214v, 217v, 225v, 424v, 432v Obeloi (†) - No Other remarks: Commentary of the Gospel. Text between 0.0-3.21 and 13. 21-22.0 is missing. Multiple {|L|} comm tags added by Athanasia Stavrοu 30.03.2012. AS alsο identified a number οf errοrs in οriginal transcriptiοn, see file 04_302490_EP_MistakesFINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: the stroke at the end of the line appears to be unsuited to form a character
The scribe does not appear to have written this name in full.
